basic_details.job_title: CNP Nashik Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 534 Junior Technician, Supervisor and More Posts
basic_details.post_name: Junior Technician, Supervisor, Welfare Officer, Safety Officer, Secretarial Assistant, Artist (Graphic Design), Junior Office Assistant and More
basic_details.short_information: The Currency Note Press Nashik (CNP Nashik SPMCIL) has published the CNP Nashik SPMCIL Recruitment 2026 notification under Advt. No. CNP/NHR/Regt./017/2020. The recruitment drive aims to fill 534 posts of Junior Technician, Supervisor, and More Vacancies. Candidates with qualifications ranging from 10th, ITI, Diploma, Graduate, to Post Graduate are eligible to apply. The online application process will be active from 20 April 2026 to 19 May 2026, and candidates can apply through the official website cnpnashik.spmcil.com. The notification PDF and apply link are available below.

application_fee.details: Candidates are required to pay the application fee as prescribed in the official notification. The fee must be paid through online mode only. Applications submitted without the prescribed fee or through an incorrect payment mode shall be rejected. Fee once paid shall not be refunded under any circumstances. Candidates are advised to retain proof of fee payment for future reference.

age_limit.age_limit: 18 to 25 / 28 / 30 Years (Post-wise, as on closing date)

qualification.welfare officer: Degree in Social Work or relevant field
qualification.supervisor (technical): Diploma in Mechanical / Electrical / Electronics Engineering
qualification.supervisor (factory): Diploma in Mechanical / Electrical / Electronics Engineering
qualification.supervisor (official language): Master's Degree in Hindi with English as a subject
qualification.artist (graphic design): Degree in Fine Arts / Commercial Art
qualification.junior technician (mechanic machine tool: ITI in Mechanic Machine Tool Maintenance / Fitter Trade
qualification.junior technician (ink factory - attenda: ITI in Ink Factory-Attendant Operator Trade
qualification.junior technician (ink factory - laborat: ITI in Ink Factory-Laboratory Assistant Trade
qualification.junior technician (mechanical/air condit: ITI in Mechanical / Air Conditioning Trade

salary_details.details: Selected candidates will receive pay and allowances as per the prescribed pay scales for their respective posts. The salary structure is as follows:

selection_process: Selection Process Computer Based Test (CBT) i.e. Online Test

The selection process for the above-mentioned posts will be based mainly on an Online Examination. The final selection will be prepared strictly on the basis of the merit list of marks obtained in the online test. However
for certain posts like Secretarial Assistant and Jr. Office Assistant
candidates must also qualify the required skill test
Selection will be through an objective-type online examination of 150 questions for 150 marks with a duration of 120 minutes.
90 Marks Basic Computer Knowledge & English Language - 30 Questions
30 Marks Logical Reasoning & Quantitative Aptitude - 30 Questions
This includes posts such as Supervisor (Technical Control)
and TO-Instrumentation. Selection will be through an objective-type online examination of 150 questions for 150 marks with 120 minutes duration.
Selection will be based on an online examination of 150 questions for 150 marks with a duration of 120 minutes.

Professional Knowledge including Hindi-English Translation & Comprehension - 30 Marks General Awareness with Computer Knowledge - 30 Marks General Hindi - 30 Marks General English - 30 Marks General Knowledge / Current Affairs - 30 Marks
Selection will be done through a Computer Based Test (CBT) followed by a Stenography Skill Test for candidates who qualify the written exam. The skill test is qualifying in nature
and the final merit list will be based on CBT marks only.
General Awareness - 30 Marks English Language - 30 Marks Logical Reasoning - 30 Marks Quantitative Aptitude - 30 Marks Computer Knowledge - 30 Marks
Stenography Test: 40 minutes total (10 minutes dictation of 800 words at 80 wpm + 30 minutes transcription).
Selection will be through an objective-type online exam of 120 questions for 120 marks with a duration of 120 minutes.
Selection will be based on CBT followed by a Typing Test for shortlisted candidates. The typing test is qualifying in nature
and final merit will be prepared on the basis of CBT marks only.
This includes posts such as Junior Technician (Control)
and Electrical/Electronics. Selection will be through an online examination of 120 questions for 120 marks with a duration of 120 minutes.
Professional Knowledge in respective trade - 85 Questions
The final merit list for all posts will be prepared on the basis of marks obtained in the Online Examination. For posts requiring Typing Test or Stenography Test
candidates must qualify the skill test separately
but the final merit will still be based only on the marks scored in the CBT/Online Examination.
how_to_apply: Candidates are required to apply online only through the official website cnpnashik.spmcil.com under the "Careers" section. No other mode of application will be accepted. The online application window is open from 20 April 2026 to 19 May 2026. Candidates must read the detailed advertisement carefully before applying and ensure all details provided are accurate. All updates including admit card, examination dates, and results will be available only on the official website.
Visit the official website cnpnashik.spmcil.com and go to the "Careers" section.
Click on the link for the online application (available from 20 April 2026).
Register and fill the online application form with all required details.
Upload necessary documents, photographs, and signatures as per instructions.
Pay the prescribed application fee online as applicable.
Submit the application and take a printout for future reference.
Keep checking the website for any corrigendum, admit card, or examination date updates.
important_instructions: Candidates applying for CNP Nashik SPMCIL Recruitment 2026 must carefully read all instructions mentioned in the official notification before submitting their application. The advertisement is for centralized recruitment across 04 units of SPMCIL - CNPN-Nashik, ISPN-Nashik, BNPD-Dewas, and SPPH-Hyderabad. The number of vacancies is tentative and may change as per organisational requirement.

Candidates must read the complete detailed notification on the official website before applying. The number of vacancies is tentative and may increase or decrease without prior notice. All updates, admit cards, and results will be available only on the official website. Application fee once paid will not be refunded under any circumstances. Canvassing in any form will lead to disqualification. For any clarification, refer to the detailed notification on cnpnashik.spmcil.com from 20 April 2026 onwards. This recruitment is centralized for 04 SPMCIL units: CNPN-Nashik, ISPN-Nashik, BNPD-Dewas, and SPPH-Hyderabad.

faq.question: Q1. What is CNP Nashik SPMCIL Recruitment 2026 for 534 posts?
faq.answer: CNP Nashik SPMCIL Recruitment 2026 is a centralized recruitment drive for 534 posts of Welfare Officer, Supervisors, Secretarial/Office staff and Junior Technicians in Currency Note Press Nashik and other SPMCIL units through an online application process.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are there and which posts are included in CNP Nashik Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are 534 vacancies in total, including 2 Welfare Officers, 1 Safety Officer, multiple Supervisor posts in various technical streams, 1 Secretarial Assistant, 1 Artist (Graphic Design), 22 Junior Office Assistants and a large number of Junior Technicians in trades like Printing, Control, Electrical, Electronics, Fitter, Machinist and Ink Factory.

faq.question: Q3. What are the online application dates for CNP Nashik SPMCIL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The online application window will open on 20 April 2026 and remain active up to 19 May 2026, and the fee payment period is also from 20 April 2026 to 19 May 2026 as per the short notice.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for CNP Nashik SPMCIL Junior Technician, Supervisor and other posts?
faq.answer: Candidates must be at least 18 years old, and the upper age limit ranges between 25, 28 and 30 years depending on the post as on the closing date, with relaxations for reserved categories as per government rules.

faq.question: Q5. What are the educational qualifications required for CNP Nashik SPMCIL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Graduation is required for Secretarial Assistant, Artist and Junior Office Assistant; Welfare Officer needs a degree in Social Work or related field; Supervisor posts require Diploma in relevant Engineering/Printing/IT or Master’s in Hindi (Official Language), while Junior Technicians must have ITI in the respective trade such as Printing, Electrical, Electronics, Fitter, Machinist, Air Conditioning or Ink Factory trades.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary or pay scale for CNP Nashik SPMCIL posts?
faq.answer: Approximate pay scales are Rs 25,740–1,03,000 for Welfare Officer, Rs 27,600–95,910 for Supervisors, Rs 23,910–85,570 for Supervisor (Official Language), Secretarial Assistant and Artist, Rs 21,340–77,160 for Junior Office Assistant and Rs 18,780–67,390 for Junior Technician posts.

faq.question: Q7. What is the application fee for CNP Nashik SPMCIL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The short notification states that the application fee for General, OBC and EWS candidates, and the fee structure for SC, ST, PwBD, Ex‑Servicemen and Female candidates will be mentioned in the detailed advertisement, and that all payments must be made online.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for CNP Nashik SPMCIL Junior Technician & Supervisor posts?
faq.answer: As per the short advertisement, the detailed selection process (likely including online written test and trade/skill test where applicable) will be provided in the detailed notification on the official website; candidates must refer to that for exam pattern, syllabus and qualifying criteria.

faq.question: Q9. How can I apply online for CNP Nashik SPMCIL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: From 20 April 2026, candidates must visit cnpnashik.spmcil.com, open the Careers section, click on the relevant recruitment link, register, fill the online application form, upload required documents and photographs, pay the applicable fee online and submit the form, then download and print the application for future reference.

faq.question: Q10. What important instructions should candidates follow for CNP Nashik SPMCIL 534 posts?
faq.answer: Applicants should read the detailed advertisement carefully once it is uploaded, ensure they meet age and educational criteria for the specific post, apply only through the official website, keep checking cnpnashik.spmcil.com for updates, and note that the number of vacancies is tentative and that canvassing in any form will lead to disqualification.
